message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals EU Size 36.5
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Luxurious Intrecciato Woven Sandals for Women
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Experience the elegance of Bottega Veneta's Lido Sandals, featuring the iconic Intrecciato woven design in a comfortable and stylish EU size 36.5.
**Description (Descrizione):** Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals embody the brand's commitment to luxury and sophistication. The Intrecciato woven design, a hallmark of Bottega Veneta, adds a unique and timeless touch to these sandals. Made from high-quality Nappa leather, these sandals are not only visually stunning but also incredibly comfortable. The EU size 36.5 ensures a perfect fit for those seeking a stylish and versatile footwear option. Whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or looking for a chic addition to your everyday wardrobe, these Lido Sandals are sure to impress.
